plato:FactoryAvailable.rdfs:label: FactoryAvailable
plato:FactoryAvailable.rdfs:comment: Requires or sets that factory is available

plato:MachineInFactory.rdfs:label: MachineInFactory
plato:MachineInFactory.rdfs:comment: Requires or sets that MachineParameter is located in a factory

plato:Machine2InFactory.rdfs:label: Machine2InFactory
plato:Machine2InFactory.rdfs:comment: Requires or sets that MachineParameter2 is located in a factory

plato:RobotInFactory.rdfs:label: RobotInFactory
plato:RobotInFactory.rdfs:comment: Requires or sets that RobotParameter is located in a factory

plato:CameraInFactory.rdfs:label: CameraInFactory
plato:CameraInFactory.rdfs:comment: Requires or sets that CameraParameter is located in a factory

plato:WorkpieceAtMachine.rdfs:label: WorkpieceAtMachine
plato:WorkpieceAtMachine.rdfs:comment: Requires or sets the location of a workpiece to be at MachineParameter

plato:WorkpieceAtMachine2.rdfs:label: WorkpieceAtMachine2
plato:WorkpieceAtMachine2.rdfs:comment: Requires or sets the location of a workpiece to be at MachineParameter2

plato:WorkpieceAtWarehouse.rdfs:label: WorkpieceAtWarehouse
plato:WorkpieceAtWarehouse.rdfs:comment: Requires or sets the location of a workpiece to be at WarehouseParameter

plato:WorkpieceAtWarehouse2.rdfs:label: WorkpieceAtWarehouse2
plato:WorkpieceAtWarehouse2.rdfs:comment: Requires or sets the location of a workpiece to be at WarehouseParameter2

plato:WorkpieceAtCamera.rdfs:label: WorkpieceAtCamera
plato:WorkpieceAtCamera.rdfs:comment: Requires or sets the location of a workpiece to be at CameraParameter

plato:WorkpiecePrinted.rdfs:label: WorkpiecePrinted
plato:WorkpiecePrinted.rdfs:comment: Requires or sets whether the workpiece has already been printed

plato:PrinterReady.rdfs:label: PrinterReady
plato:PrinterReady.rdfs:comment: Requires or sets whether a printer is ready

plato:PrinterCanPrintMaterial.rdfs:label: PrinterCanPrintMaterial
plato:PrinterCanPrintMaterial.rdfs:comment: Requires or sets whether a printer can print a material

plato:CameraReady.rdfs:label: CameraReady
plato:CameraReady.rdfs:comment: Requires or sets whether a camera is ready

plato:RobotReady.rdfs:label: RobotReady
plato:RobotReady.rdfs:comment: Requires or sets whether a robot is ready

plato:WorkpieceQualityChecked.rdfs:label: WorkpieceQualityChecked
plato:WorkpieceQualityChecked.rdfs:comment: Requires or sets whether the workpiece has already undergone a quality check

plato:WorkpieceIsMadeOfMaterial.rdfs:label: WorkpieceIsMadeOfMaterial
plato:WorkpieceIsMadeOfMaterial.rdfs:comment: Requires or sets whether the material of a workpiece

plato:RobotCanTransportBetween.rdfs:label: RobotCanTransportBetween
plato:RobotCanTransportBetween.rdfs:comment: Requires that a robot can transport between two machines

plato:PreconditionFactoryAvailable.rdfs:label: PreconditionFactoryAvailable
plato:PreconditionFactoryAvailable.rdfs:comment: Requires the factory to be available

plato:PrintWorkpiecePreconditionPrinterI.rdfs:label: PrintWorkpiecePreconditionPrinterInFactory
plato:PrintWorkpiecePreconditionPrinterI.rdfs:comment: Requires the printer to be in the specified factory

plato:PrintWorkpiecePreconditionPrinterR.rdfs:label: PrintWorkpiecePreconditionPrinterReady
plato:PrintWorkpiecePreconditionPrinterR.rdfs:comment: Requires the printer to be ready for printing

plato:PrintWorkpiecePreconditionPrinterC.rdfs:label: PrintWorkpiecePreconditionPrinterCanPrintMaterial
plato:PrintWorkpiecePreconditionPrinterC.rdfs:comment: Requires the printer to be able to print a specific material

plato:PrintWorkpiecePreconditionWorkpiec.rdfs:label: PrintWorkpiecePreconditionWorkpieceNotPrinted
plato:PrintWorkpiecePreconditionWorkpiec.rdfs:comment: Requires the workpiece to have not been already printed

plato:PrintWorkpieceEffectWorkpiecePrint.rdfs:label: PrintWorkpieceEffectWorkpiecePrinted
plato:PrintWorkpieceEffectWorkpiecePrint.rdfs:comment: Specifies that a workpiece has been printed

plato:PrintWorkpieceEffectWorkpieceMater.rdfs:label: PrintWorkpieceEffectWorkpieceMaterial
plato:PrintWorkpieceEffectWorkpieceMater.rdfs:comment: Specifies that a workpiece has been printed with a specific material

plato:PrintWorkpieceEffectWorkpieceAtMac.rdfs:label: PrintWorkpieceEffectWorkpieceAtMachine
plato:PrintWorkpieceEffectWorkpieceAtMac.rdfs:comment: Specifies that a workpiece is located at the machine that printed it

plato:TransportWorkpiecePreconditionRobo.rdfs:label: TransportWorkpiecePreconditionRobotReady
plato:TransportWorkpiecePreconditionRobo.rdfs:comment: Requires the robot to be ready for transporting

plato:TransportWorkpiecePreconditionWork.rdfs:label: TransportWorkpiecePreconditionWorkpiecePrinted
plato:TransportWorkpiecePreconditionWork.rdfs:comment: Requires the workpiece to have been already printed

plato:TransportWorkpiecePreconditionWork.rdfs:label: TransportWorkpiecePreconditionWorkpieceAtMachine
plato:TransportWorkpiecePreconditionWork.rdfs:comment: Requires that a workpiece is located at the machine

plato:TransportWorkpiecePreconditionCanT.rdfs:label: TransportWorkpiecePreconditionCanTransportBetween
plato:TransportWorkpiecePreconditionCanT.rdfs:comment: Requires that the robot can transport between the two machines

plato:TransportWorkpieceEffectWorkpieceA.rdfs:label: TransportWorkpieceEffectWorkpieceAtMachine2
plato:TransportWorkpieceEffectWorkpieceA.rdfs:comment: Specifies that a workpiece is located at the second machine

plato:TransportWorkpieceEffectWorkpieceN.rdfs:label: TransportWorkpieceEffectWorkpieceNotAtMachine
plato:TransportWorkpieceEffectWorkpieceN.rdfs:comment: Specifies that a workpiece is no longer located at the first machine

plato:CheckWorkpieceQualityPreconditionC.rdfs:label: CheckWorkpieceQualityPreconditionCameraInFactory
plato:CheckWorkpieceQualityPreconditionC.rdfs:comment: Requires the camera to be in the specified factory

plato:CheckWorkpieceQualityPreconditionC.rdfs:label: CheckWorkpieceQualityPreconditionCameraReady
plato:CheckWorkpieceQualityPreconditionC.rdfs:comment: Requires the camera to be ready for a quality check

plato:CheckWorkpieceQualityPreconditionW.rdfs:label: CheckWorkpieceQualityPreconditionWorkpieceAtCamera
plato:CheckWorkpieceQualityPreconditionW.rdfs:comment: Requires the workpiece to be located at the camera

plato:CheckWorkpieceQualityEffectQuality.rdfs:label: CheckWorkpieceQualityEffectQualityChecked
plato:CheckWorkpieceQualityEffectQuality.rdfs:comment: Specifies that a quality check has been performed on a workpiece

plato:TransportWorkpiecePreconditionRobo.rdfs:label: TransportWorkpiecePreconditionRobotInFactory
plato:TransportWorkpiecePreconditionRobo.rdfs:comment: Requires the robot to be located in the specified factory

plato:TransportWorkpiecePreconditionMach.rdfs:label: TransportWorkpiecePreconditionMachine1InFactory
plato:TransportWorkpiecePreconditionMach.rdfs:comment: Requires the first machine to be located in the specified factory

plato:TransportWorkpiecePreconditionMach.rdfs:label: TransportWorkpiecePreconditionMachine2InFactory
plato:TransportWorkpiecePreconditionMach.rdfs:comment: Requires the second machine to be located in the specified factory

plato:TransportWorkpieceBetweenWarehouse.rdfs:label: TransportWorkpieceBetweenWarehousesPreconditionWorkpieceAtWarehouse
plato:TransportWorkpieceBetweenWarehouse.rdfs:comment: Requires the workpiece to be located at the origin warehouse

plato:TransportWorkpieceBetweenWarehouse.rdfs:label: TransportWorkpieceBetweenWarehousesEffectWorkpieceNotAtWarehouse
plato:TransportWorkpieceBetweenWarehouse.rdfs:comment: Specifies that a workpiece is no longer at the origin warehouse

plato:TransportWorkpieceBetweenWarehouse.rdfs:label: TransportWorkpieceBetweenWarehousesEffectWorkpieceAtWarehouse
plato:TransportWorkpieceBetweenWarehouse.rdfs:comment: Specifies that a workpiece is at the destination warehouse

plato:EffectFactoriesAvailable.rdfs:label: EffectFactoriesAvailable
plato:EffectFactoriesAvailable.rdfs:comment: An advanced statement for an effect that sets all factories to be available

plato:EffectConditionFactoryAvailable.rdfs:label: EffectConditionFactoriesAvailable
plato:EffectConditionFactoryAvailable.rdfs:comment: An statement for an advanced effect that sets all factories to be available
